title: Buttery Gooey Moroccan Beans Wrap
description: A creamy, spicy bean filling tossed with aromatic spices and wrapped in whole wheat tortillas for a buttery, gooey lunch.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium heat. Add diced onion and sauté until translucent, about 3 minutes.
Add minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, stirring frequently.
Stir in cumin, coriander, cinnamon, harissa paste, and tomato paste. Cook for 1 minute until fragrant.
Add the cooked beans and stir to coat with the spice mixture. Cook 2-3 minutes, adding a splash of water if the mixture looks dry.
Add butter and cream cheese, stirring until the butter melts and the mixture becomes silky and gooey.
Warm the tortillas in a dry pan or microwave for 10-15 seconds until pliable.
Spoon the bean mixture onto the center of each tortilla, fold the sides over, and roll tightly.
Place the wraps seam‑side down in the skillet over medium‑low heat. Cook 2-3 minutes per side until the edges are golden and crisp.
Serve hot, optionally garnished with a squeeze of lemon or chopped parsley if desired.
